base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rock_projectile — a projectile from 1986 legend of zelda. Falling rock — thrown down from Death Mountain cliff-faces. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Falling rock — thrown down from Death Mountain cliff-faces; static sprite projectile that travels in set arcs
